articles.title: Lesson I Theology and Testimony (First Week in December)
articles.notes: The provided PDF pages (26-30) contain editorial content, appreciation notes, error corrections, and conference addresses by Inez Knight Allen, Ida Peterson Beal, and Louise Y. Robison. The article 'Lesson I Theology and Testimony (First Week in December)' is not present on these pages. According to the table of contents, this lesson should be on page 561, but the provided pages are from the earlier editorial section of the magazine.
